metadata.title:
SERVES NOTICE
ON v. v. P.

pages.raw_text:
Fire Commissioner ONO this
morning notified the Washington
Water Power Co. that hereafter
when any of its employees are about
to begin stringing high power wires
In the vicinity OF any fire alarm
boxes. Albert Thielman, electrician
with the fire department. must be
notified so the alarm boxes may be
afforded proper protection.


This order is the result of the
burning out of an alarm box on the
Division st. bridge Oct. IA through
w. w. p. wires coming in contact
with wires of the fire department.


The company has made no reply
to am official communication calling
attention to the violation of wire
franchises by stringing wires above
the cross arms reserved for the
city's use.
